urdu transliteration text:
AYE FARISHTON MUJHE KARBALA LE CHALO
AYE FARISHTON MUJHE KARBALA LE CHALO
english translation text: O Angels, please take me to Karbala…

urdu transliteration text: APNE MAULA KE KADMO KO CHUMUNGA MAI
english translation text: I will kiss the feet of my Master

urdu transliteration text: FARSH SE ARSH KOH AAJ CHUMUNGA MAI
english translation text: From this earth, I will kiss the sky today

urdu transliteration text: YEH IBADAT KOH HARGIZ NA BHULUNGA MAI
english translation text: I will never forget this worship…

urdu transliteration text: TUMKO ALLAH KA WASTA LE CHALO
english translation text: I plead you in the name of God, please take me…

urdu transliteration text: HAQ ADAAI HU MAI TUMKO MAALUM HAI
english translation text: You know that I am not ungrateful

urdu transliteration text: EK FIDAAI HU MAI TUMKO MALUM HAI
english translation text: You know that I am in love (with Ahlul Bayt)

urdu transliteration text: KARBALAAI HU MAI TUMKO MALUM HAI
english translation text: You know that I am a Karbalaai

urdu transliteration text: MERI MAYYAT YAHA SE UTHA LE CHALO
english translation text: Please carry my dead body and take me there…

urdu transliteration text: YEH LAHAD TOH NAHI HAI THIKANA MERA
english translation text: This grave is not the final destination for me

urdu transliteration text: YAANI HAI AB WAHI AAB DAANA MERA
english translation text: This means that now my water and food is provided therein

urdu transliteration text: BAN GAYA HAI WAHI AASHYANA MERA
english translation text: This has become my abode now

urdu transliteration text:
Please take me either to Najaf or Nainawa (Karbala)
YAA NAJAF MUJHKO YA NAINAVA LE CHALO
SAR KE BAL AAJ CHALTA HUA AA JAUGA
english translation text: I will crawl and come back

urdu transliteration text: HAI IRAADA YAHI SAMARRAH JAUGA
english translation text: I intend to go to Samarrah

urdu transliteration text: MAI KHURASAN NAJAF KARBALA JAAUNGA
english translation text: I will go to Khurasaan, Najaf and Karbala

urdu transliteration text: KHULD JAHA HAI MUJHE US JAGAH LE CHALO
english translation text: Where the heaven is on earth, please take me there…

urdu transliteration text: ALLAH ALLAH GHAAZI KA ROBO HASHAM
english translation text: O God! The might and authority of Ghaazi (Abbas A.S)…

urdu transliteration text: SEENAE AAB PAR USNE GAARDA ALAM
english translation text: He planted his flag in the chest of the river

urdu transliteration text: SOCHA SAHIL PE YEH BEHRE AHLE HARAM
english translation text: He thought at the banks of river Euphrates, for the sake of the families

urdu transliteration text: DOSH PAR RAKHKE YEH ALQAMA LE CHALO
english translation text: Carry water on my shoulders and take me there…

urdu transliteration text: AI ABAD MERI JANNAT HAI KARBOBALA
english translation text: O Abad (poet), my paradise is Karbobala

urdu transliteration text: MERI MATTI ME HAI ISHQE AALE IBAA
english translation text: The love of Ahlul Bayt is deeply ground with my clay (essence)

urdu transliteration text:
I don’t want anything besides…
KUCH NAI CHAYE MUJHKO USKE SIWAA
SUE DAAMANE AHLE KISA LE CHALO
english translation text: The presence of Ahle Kisa (the people of the cloak), so please take me there…
